decisions.decision: SDK method names: short verbs not session{Verb}
decisions.rationale: Actual @opencode-ai/sdk uses client.session.create/prompt/abort/diff/fork/revert — not the session{Verb} pattern assumed in RESEARCH.md
client.postSessionIdPermissionsPermissionId() is on OpencodeClient, not client.session — confirmed from SDK type declarations

decisions.decision: Permission enum is once/always/reject not allow/deny/allow_always
decisions.rationale: REQUIREMENTS.md CORE-04 has wrong values; API enum confirmed from @opencode-ai/sdk types.gen.d.ts line 2509

decisions.decision: Zod v4 compatible with MCP SDK 1.29.0
decisions.rationale: WR-01 not a runtime issue — registerTool works fine and UAT test 1 confirmed live tool calls succeed
TypeScript 6.x requires explicit node types for process global — auto-fixed during Plan 02 execution
